notes: EDCフレームワークによる自動スキーマ発見（Extract-Define-Canonicalize）
SYN01_白波_設備保全管理規程: doctype=社内規程_就業規則 (+16関係/12型, triplets=11)
SYN02_白波_検査様式集: doctype=社内規程_就業規則 (+15関係/12型, triplets=20)
SYN03_白波_用語集: doctype=社内規程_就業規則 (+15関係/12型, triplets=15)
SYN04_白波_機器台帳: doctype=UNKNOWN (+3関係/0型, triplets=24)
SYN05_白波_不適合事例集: doctype=NCR_不適合是正処置報告書 (+16関係/17型, triplets=15)

node_type_definitions.Section: 章・節・条項・項目などの文書構造単位
node_type_definitions.Term: 用語・型式名・略語など、辞書アンカー対象の用語エンティティ
node_type_definitions.Entity: 上記以外の実体の総称(設備・人・組織・事象等。ドメイン型で具体化される)
node_type_definitions.Actor: 対象者(労働者・使用者・管理監督者等)
node_type_definitions.Action: 行為・手続き(届出・採用・解雇・休業等)
node_type_definitions.Condition: 条件・状態(請求・傷病等)
node_type_definitions.Period: 期間・時間範囲(2週間・3か月等)
node_type_definitions.Law: 法令・条文(労働基準法等)
node_type_definitions.Product: 製品・装置・対象物(蒸気ドラム等)
node_type_definitions.Process: 工程・作業・検査(溶接・UT等)
node_type_definitions.Defect: 欠陥・不適合事象(割れ・水素割れ等)
node_type_definitions.Cause: 原因・要因(予熱不足等)
node_type_definitions.Standard: 規格・基準・手順(WPS・JIS等)
node_type_definitions.Parameter: パラメータ・数値条件(予熱温度・炭素当量等)
node_type_definitions.Person: 個人(起票者・確認者等)
node_type_definitions.Identifier: 番号・識別子(報告書番号・製番等)

relations.name: APPLIES_TO
relations.description: 規範/規定が適用される対象(労働者・使用者等)

relations.name: APPLIES_WHEN
relations.description: 規範/手続きが適用される条件・場合

relations.name: CAUSES
relations.description: 原因・要因が事象/不適合を直接引き起こす

relations.name: CONTRIBUTES_TO
relations.description: 直接原因ではないが発生確率を高めた背景・寄与要因

relations.name: DEFINES
relations.description: 主語(条項・文書)が目的語(用語)の定義を与える。定義文かどうかで MENTIONS と区別

relations.name: FOLLOWS
relations.description: 一連の是正プロセスにおける時系列的な手順・後続

relations.name: GOVERNED_BY
relations.description: 規定の根拠となる法令・上位規程

relations.name: HAS_STEP
relations.description: 手続き/フローが含む手順・ステップ

relations.name: IS_A
relations.description: 主語が目的語の一種である(上位下位・分類)

relations.name: MENTIONS
relations.description: 主語が目的語に言及する(定義ではない単純な言及)

relations.name: MITIGATES
relations.description: 影響を限定し被害を最小化するための応急/暫定処置

relations.name: PART_OF
relations.description: 主語が目的語の構成要素・一部である

relations.name: PRECEDES
relations.description: 手順が別の手順に先行する

relations.name: PREVENTS
relations.description: 再発を防止するための恒久的な是正処置

relations.name: REFERS_TO
relations.description: 主語が目的語(他条項・文書・規格)を参照する

relations.name: REQUIRES
relations.description: 対象が満たす/提出する必要がある事項

relations.name: REQUIRES_APPROVAL_FROM
relations.description: 手続きが必要とする承認者・承認権限

relations.name: SUBORDINATE_TO
relations.description: 主語が目的語の下位・従属である(章節などの階層)

relations.name: VALIDATED_BY
relations.description: 処置/工程が基準を満たすかを確認する検査・検証

relations.name: does_not_apply_to
relations.description: The subject entity does not cover or is not applicable to the object entity.

relations.name: has_action
relations.description: The subject entity involves the corrective action or measure specified by the object entity.

relations.name: has_former_name
relations.description: The subject entity was previously known by the name specified by the object entity.

relations.name: has_identifier
relations.description: The subject entity is identified by the unique code or identifier specified by the object entity.

relations.name: has_item
relations.description: The subject entity contains the specific item or data field specified by the object entity.

relations.name: has_main_parts
relations.description: The subject entity consists of or contains the component specified by the object entity as one of its main parts.

relations.name: has_purpose
relations.description: The subject entity is designed to achieve the goal or objective specified by the object entity.

relations.name: has_retention_period
relations.description: The subject entity must be preserved for the duration of time specified by the object entity.

relations.name: issued_by
relations.description: The subject entity was issued or published by the organization or entity specified by the object entity.

relations.name: official_name
relations.description: The subject entity is formally known by the name specified by the object entity.

relations.name: registers
relations.description: The subject entity serves as a record or ledger that registers the object entity.

relations.name: used_in
relations.description: The subject entity is utilized within the context or time period specified by the object entity.
